steps.title: Use the pineapple parallel
steps.content: The first example says the domesticated pineapple is no longer identical to its wild ancestor. The word also signals that summer squash has a similar relationship to its own wild ancestor.

steps.title: Name the changed relationship
steps.content: B suggests assistance, C suggests disagreement, and D suggests a response; none describes how a domesticated crop differs from its ancestor. The phrase varies from means differs from, matching the contrast between hard, bitter wild squash and soft, mild cultivated squash. The answer is A.
